query:
-- Direct head expenses for BEE0003
SELECT 'direct' as type, id, expenseDate, amount FROM expenses 
WHERE headId = 120003 AND targetType = 'head' AND deletedAt IS NULL;

-- Category expenses for Beef Calf (categoryId=2) 
SELECT 'category' as type, id, expenseDate, amount FROM expenses 
WHERE targetType = 'category' AND categoryTarget = 2 AND deletedAt IS NULL 
AND expenseDate >= '2026-06-13';

-- How many Beef Calf animals existed on 2026-06-13
SELECT COUNT(*) as beefCalfCount FROM animals 
WHERE categoryId = 2 AND deletedAt IS NULL 
AND acquisitionDate <= '2026-06-14' 
AND (exitDate IS NULL OR exitDate >= '2026-06-13');
